data.body:
## Description

**What**: Wire ticket-transition.sh to use batch_close_operations:
(a) Replace Step 1b (lines 108-116, ticket_find_open_children bash call) with: invoke python3 ticket-unblock.py --batch-close before the flock section
(b) Parse JSON output via Python inline (not bash JSON parsing) to extract open_children and unblocked arrays
(c) If open_children non-empty: print error with child IDs and exit 1 (same behavior as before)
(d) Replace Step 4 (lines 267-287, separate ticket-unblock.py call) with: use the unblocked result from the batch call above
(e) Maintain DSO_UNBLOCK_SCRIPT env override for test isolation
(f) The --batch-close call happens BEFORE the flock (read-only), same TOCTOU trade-off as documented

**Why**: GREEN phase — make Task 3's RED tests pass. Eliminates 2n Python process spawns.

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-transition.sh

### TDD Requirement
Task 3's RED tests turn GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ticket_find_open_children no longer called from ticket-transition.sh
  Verify: ! grep -q 'ticket_find_open_children' plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-transition.sh
- [ ] --batch-close invocation present in ticket-transition.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'batch-close' plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-transition.sh
- [ ] .test-index RED marker removed
  Verify: ! grep -q 'ticket-transition.sh.*\[test_close_with_open_children' .test-index
